summary_text: **Preflight simulation result** 最小変更面は「X投稿そのもの」ではなく、リンク先 `note` 下書きのアイキャッチ差し替え経路でした。リポジトリ内には X/Twitter へ既存投稿の画像を更新する実装は見当たらず、画像アップロード先は `note_eyecatch` のみです（[note-draft-upload.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-draft-upload.js#L427)）。`X URL` は文脈参照として扱う設計です（[social-context-reference.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/social-context-reference.sh#L81)）。 最小変更候補: - 下書き frontmatter の `eyecatch_image_path` / `thumbnail_prompt`（例: [ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md#L11)） - 画像生成の出力先解決と dry-run確認（[note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L104), [note-thumbnail-gen.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L256)） - 下書きアップロード時の eyecatch 添付可否確認（[note-draft-upload.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-draft-upload.js#L355), [note-draft-upload.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-draft-upload.js#L399)） - 連携導線は `note-semi-auto --action thumbnail|upload|full`（[note-semi-auto.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh#L61), [note-semi-auto.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh#L140)） **Dry-run checks (executed)** - `node scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md --dry-run` - `success:true`, 出力先 `.../docs/drafts/20260401_ai-security-guideline_thumbnail.jpg` - `node scripts/local/integrations/note-draft-upload.js docs/drafts/ai-security-guideline-note-2026-04-01.md --dry-run` - `success:true`, `eyecatch.requested:true`, `eyecatch.available:true` - `bash tests/test-note-thumbnail-gen.sh` → passed - `bash tests/test-note-draft-upload.sh` → passed 結論として、このリポジトリでの最小安全ルートは「対象ドラフトの `eyecatch_image_path` を起点にサムネ生成→note下書き反映」で、X既存投稿の直接差し替えは別系統対応が必要です。
